title: RTK Context Compressor
description: RTK Context Compressor is a paid remote MCP endpoint for OpenAI Codex context compressor. It exposes structured JSON tools, a public server card, token-based access, usage receipts, and audit-ready workflow evidence for AI agents and coding teams.
